title: Marketplace Manager - Park Avenue - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Park Avenue - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
